mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question(subject_id, type, content, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer, score) VALUES(#{subjectId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{answer}, #{score})
